entry.title: Back To Flex
entry.summary: It’s been a long while since I changed anything here and as is often the case, when I tried to update pelican and the pelican-bootstrap3 theme started giving me a lot of grief. After much messing about, I switched back to the Flex theme which seems to be working …
entry.content: It’s been a long while since I changed anything here and as is often the case, when I tried to update pelican and the pelican-bootstrap3 theme started giving me a lot of grief. After much messing about, I switched back to the Flex theme which seems to be working fine.
